subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out about a potential collaboration. We're excited to explore how our teams can work together.

We have the following slots available for a 2-hour introductory call:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let us know which of these times works best for your team, and we'll send a calendar invite.

Regarding your request for internal contact information: we're unable to share direct contact details for our team members at this stage of the discussion. All collaboration communication will be coordinated through this email address, and we'll ensure the right stakeholders are included in all relevant discussions as we move forward.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards,
Team
company.internal
